roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
DEF ATTORNEY MOT TO REDO 5-27-21 TERMINATION OF STAY AWY FILED
/X:JUDGE FLEMING APPEARS VIA ZOOM/SATERM/SAORD/SA1:DEBBIE WALSH/SA1:RAMONA LOCKHART/SA1:MARCIA SIMS/SA1:CLARENCE W/EMTERM/CONTD: TO SET 3455PCPRCS/DOP/

/CAL: APD 3455PC MOTION/WIAPRCS/CTORD: PRCS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/OR//X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD: DEFENDANTTO REPORT TO APD IN PERSON ON 04-12-21/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO STAY AWAY FROM62 DAKOTA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/CONTD: TO SET APD 3455PC/DOP/
/CAL: MOTION TO REDO STAY AWAY TERMINATINO ORDER/DAWT/SATERM/X: ORDER ISSIGNED BY JUDGE FLEMMING AND IS FILED/X: MATTER IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR,/
/X:JUDGE FLEMING APPEARS VIA ZOOM/DAWT/CAL:TO SET 3455PC PRCS/CONT/DOPC/
